overall.description: A cinematic game engine shot of a grand Gothic dining hall resembling Hogwarts' Great Hall, filled with students eating breakfast at long wooden tables. Warm morning sunlight streams through tall stained glass windows while hundreds of floating candles illuminate the high vaulted ceiling from above.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand Gothic dining hall with house tables

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the dining hall from a fixed elevated position overlooking the central aisle

notable_agents.action: students in dark robes eating breakfast and conversing at the long wooden table
students seated at the right-side table facing the center aisle

entered.detail: hundreds of floating candles suspended in mid-air throughout the ceiling space providing warm magical illumination
tall ornate stained glass windows at the far end of the hall casting colored morning light onto the floor
long wooden house table lined with students and breakfast items extending down the left side
parallel wooden dining table on the right side filled with seated students
Gothic stone archway with pointed arches framing the left wall of the hall
high vaulted wooden ceiling with exposed beams rising above the candlelight

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady wide shot of a magnificent Gothic dining hall bathed in warm golden morning light. Hundreds of floating candles hover beneath a high vaulted wooden ceiling, while students in dark robes eat breakfast at long wooden tables arranged in parallel rows. Stained glass windows at the far end cast colorful light across the marble floor, creating a magical atmosphere typical of a wizarding school.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, wide perspective of a magnificent Gothic dining hall bathed in the warm, magical glow of a wizarding morning. It begins by capturing the vast scale of the room, where hundreds of floating candles hover beneath a high vaulted wooden ceiling. As the gaze lingers, the focus shifts toward the long wooden tables arranged in parallel rows, filled with students in dark robes eating breakfast. The scene finally draws the eye toward the far end of the hall, where tall stained glass windows cast vibrant, colorful light across the polished marble floor.
